arts.ttl: Arsenal star Declan Rice picks out Tottenham trio in interview straight after derby win
arts.sum: Declan Rice was keen to praise some of Tottenham's young stars after their north London derby displays with Archie Gray among those to impress despite the defeat at the Emirates

arts.ttl: How Arsenal's next five Premier League fixtures compare to Liverpool's
arts.sum: How Arsenal's upcoming Premier League fixtures compare to leaders Liverpool after Wednesday's North London Derby.

arts.ttl: Arteta confirms Arsenal are aiming to sign a forward
arts.sum: Former striker Emmanuel Adebayor, who played for both Arsenal and Spurs, believes goalscoring remains a major problem for the Gunners, who had 14 shots in Wednesday's derby but got only four on target. The Gunners beat Tottenham Hotspur 2-1 in Wednesday's London derby but lacked a killer edge, their goals coming from a set-piece and a shot from Leandro Trossard which goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky would perhaps have expected to save.

arts.ttl: Door ajar for Arsenal after derby win
arts.sum: Reaction from Declan Rice, Mikel Arteta & Ange Postecoglu as Arsenal win at the Emirates.

arts.ttl: Arsenal achieve club first in North London derby win as Tottenham match unwanted 36-year statistic
arts.sum: Arsenal achieve a North London derby feat they had never previously managed in the Premier League era during their 2-1 comeback win over Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: What’s the reality of this Tottenham team, supremely unlucky or unforgivably naive?
arts.athr: Jonathan Liew at the Emirates Stadium
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has a good side in there somewhere, but also one addicted to danger, impulsive and impatient Pedro Porro hit the post in the 94th minute. It was an opportunistic shot from a tight angle, about 20 yards out. No kind of angle for a shot, really. But it was struck well, fierce and swerving viciously away from David Raya in the Arsenal goal, who probably wouldn’t have saved it. The frame was still rattling several seconds later. So, here’s a thought exercise. What are the consequences if Porro’s shot goes in? Does it make this Tottenham team any better? Does it change our assessment of their season so far? Does it render the club any better run or better coached? It shouldn’t, right? A hopeful pot-shot going an inch to the left shouldn’t mean anything beyond itself. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals that Arsenal are 'actively looking' to sign a striker THIS MONTH to fire the Gunners to the title after losing Bukayo Saka and Gabriel Jesus to long-term injuries
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has revealed that Arsenal are 'actively looking' for a striker to fill the void left by injured forwards Bukayo Saka and Gabriel Jesus as his side look to stay the course in the title race.

arts.ttl: 'Not unacceptable' - Postecoglou on 'thin ice' at Spurs
arts.sum: With six defeats in their past 10 games, a loss to their biggest rivals and closer to the relegation zone than the top four, things are going from bad to worse for Tottenham.
Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou says his side's first-half performance in their north London derby defeat by Arsenal was "unacceptable".
Match of the Day pundits Micah Richards and Alan Shearer discuss how Arsenal beat a "passive" Tottenham Hotspur 2-1 in the Premier League.
